subject: Re: Fwd: 11e furniture
body:
no me neither


----- Original Message ----
From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
To: Jeffrey E Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, May 8, 2007 11:58:22 AM
Subject: Fwd: 11e furniture


Do you like any of these living room things ?
Also, Greg sent me a link to this website with chrome bar stools. I don't really like them, do you ? http://www.kpetersen.com/barstoolschrome.htm

Note: forwarded message attached.


Ahhh...imagining that irresistible "new car" smell?
Check out new cars at Yahoo! Autos. 
Take a look at these items for the living room, tell me which you like.
 
 
Greg Horowitz
ghorowitz@zeffdesign.com 
 
zeffdesign
 
515 West 20th St, 4W
New York,  NY  10011
 
P. 212.580.7090 x219
F. 212.580.7181
www.zeffdesign.com
